title: Prym - White (3x2,25mm) Bra Extender Hooks - 1 Piece
features: Bra extender for hooking between the bra ends
description: Product Description The bra extender is made of polyamide and elastane with three adjustment possibilities to extend the underbust measurement for bras. They are simply hooked between the two ends of the bra. Due to the additionally processed elastic band and the seam-free processing, favourite bras that have become too tight can be worn again very comfortably. It is tested for skin tolerance and are washable up to 40 degrees. Safety Warning Keep away from children. Box Contains 1 x Bra extender See more
